Requirement.Name: Explore Maze
Requirement.Content: The system shall autonomously explore an unknown maze

Requirement.Name: Wall Detection
Requirement.Content: The system shall detect and avoid walls

Requirement.Name: Create Map
Requirement.Content: The system shall create an internal representation of the maze

Requirement.Name: Cell Clasification
Requirement.Content: The system shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas

Requirement.Name: Time Constraint
Requirement.Content: The system shall complete mapping of the maze within 5 minutes

Requirement.Name: Path Planning
Requirement.Content: The system shall compute an optimal path to the target

Requirement.Name: Return to Start
Requirement.Content: The system shall return to start after the exploration is done

Requirement.Name: Second Run
Requirement.Content: The system shall, after returning to the start cell, perform a second run from the start cell to the goal region using the fastest path as defined in HL-RUN-1.3 and shall report success or failure of this second run.

Requirement.Name: Efficient Path Execution
Requirement.Content: The Second run shall follow the fastest path to the target

Requirement.Name: Collision Avoidance
Requirement.Content: The robot shall not collide with walls

Requirement.Name: Sensor Noise Handling
Requirement.Content: The software shall account for noisy and imprecise sensor measurements during navigation and mapping

Requirement.Name: Sensor Processing
Requirement.Content: The system shall be able to process sensor data defined in the sensor data interface description

Requirement.Name: Actuator Control
Requirement.Content: The system shall be able to send control commands to actuators with commands specified in motor interface description

Requirement.Name: Access Front Ultrasonic Sensor
Requirement.Content: The software shall access the front ultrasonic sensor using the function float ultrasonic_get_distance()

Requirement.Name: Front Distance Measurement
Requirement.Content: The system shall expect the ultrasonic sensor to return the distance to the nearest front obstacle in centimeters

Requirement.Name: Ultrasonic Accuracy
Requirement.Content: The system shall account for an approximate front ultrasonic sensor accuracy of +-12 cm

Requirement.Name: Access IR Sensors
Requirement.Content: The software shall access the left infrared obstacle sensor using the function uint8_t infrared_get_dsl_status() for the left infrared sensor and uint8_t infrared_get_dsr_status() for the right one

Requirement.Name: Binary IR Detection
Requirement.Content: The system shall expect binary obstacle detection data from the infrared sensors

Requirement.Name: IR Detection Range
Requirement.Content: The system shall assume that infrared obstacle detection is possible at an approximate range of 4 cm

Requirement.Name: IR Sensor Orientation
Requirement.Content: The system shall expect data from infrared sensors mounted at approximately 25 deg angles relative to the robot front direction

Requirement.Name: Robot Shape
Requirement.Content: The system shall be able to control a circular robot platform with a diameter of 11cm

Requirement.Name: Differential Drive System
Requirement.Content: The system shall support a differential drive robot with independently controlled left and right motors. The motor is able to be controlled with the void motor_set(uint8_t left_speed, uint8_t right_speed); left_speed and right_speed being a value between 0 and 100 setting the left and right speed independently

Requirement.Name: Rotational Velocity
Requirement.Content: The system shall not assume a constant rotational speed

Requirement.Name: Translational Velocity
Requirement.Content: The system shall handle speeds from 0cm/s (left and right speed = 0 ) upto 200cm/s (left and right speed = 100), but limit the actual high speed in order to avoid collisions

Requirement.Name: Maze Grid Structure
Requirement.Content: The system shall assume a maze structure consisting of a 4x8 cell grid

Requirement.Name: Maze Cell Dimensions
Requirement.Content: The system shall assume maze cells with dimensions of approximately 17.2 cm x 17.2 cm

Requirement.Name: Maze Wall Thickness
Requirement.Content: The system shall assume maze walls with a thickness of approximately 1.6 cm

Requirement.Name: Maze Wall Placement
Requirement.Content: The system shall assume that walls can be positioned between adjacent maze cells

Requirement.Name: Static Maze Environment
Requirement.Content: The system shall assume that the maze structure remains static during operation

Requirement.Name: Goal Area Detection
Requirement.Content: The system shall identify a free 2x2 cell area as the maze goal region
